query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS assessor_subscriptions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  marketplace_profile_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  tier ENUM('free','pro') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  max_claims_per_month INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  expires_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_assessor_sub_profile (marketplace_profile_id),
  UNIQUE KEY uq_assessor_sub_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_assessor_sub_tier (tier),
  INDEX idx_assessor_sub_expires (expires_at)
);

-- Tier caps: free = 10 claims/month, pro = unlimited (9999)
-- Default is enforced at insert time via application logic
